subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God unto him who hath been guided by the lights of the Spirit and who is of them that have believed and been guided aright. Say: O servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الله الی الذی اهتدی بانوار الروح و کان ممن آمن و هدی ان یا عبد قل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution
